personal.preferred_title: Dynatrace Administrator | APM Specialist | Performance Monitoring

summary: APM and observability specialist with extensive enterprise experience implementing, managing, and optimizing Dynatrace and related performance-monitoring platforms. Proven track record in monitoring architecture, alerting strategy, incident diagnostics, and performance tuning across mission-critical systems. Strong operational mindset with hands-on delivery in production environments and close collaboration with engineering and infrastructure teams.

experience.title: Performance Engineer (Dynatrace)
bullets: Owned administration and support of Dynatrace AppMon and synthetic monitoring for enterprise customer-facing systems.
Implemented dashboards, monitoring coverage, and operational diagnostics improving visibility and troubleshooting efficiency.
Supported production monitoring lifecycle including onboarding, tuning, and incident response alignment.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Managed and integrated enterprise monitoring environments including CA APM, AppDynamics, and infrastructure telemetry systems.
Developed monitoring and analytics workflows for 6,000+ endpoints to support proactive performance and capacity management.
Collaborated with operations and engineering teams to investigate bottlenecks and improve system reliability.

experience.title: Senior Consultant (APM SME)
bullets: Led large-scale APM implementations/upgrades and supported thousands of monitored agents in enterprise environments.
Designed management modules, alerts, and dashboards; tuned configurations for stability and actionable performance insights.
Provided troubleshooting and optimization support for application/infrastructure performance in high-pressure production contexts.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Performed performance analysis and instrumentation across J2EE applications, including JVM/JMX and system-level metrics.
Produced monitoring-based recommendations to improve throughput and application stability.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Contributed to high-scale production modernization projects with strong focus on performance, reliability, and operational readiness.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

projects.name: Dynatrace Enterprise Monitoring Program
projects.description: Implemented and managed Dynatrace monitoring coverage, dashboards, and diagnostics processes for business-critical production systems.

projects.name: APM Optimization and Incident Response Enablement
projects.description: Improved performance visibility and response workflows through monitoring design, alert tuning, and cross-team operational support.
